targets.rawSql:
SELECT collectDate_1 time
     , ServerName
     , CounterValue as USE_PCT
  FROM (SELECT A.col1+B.col1 ROWNUM
             , ServerName
             , MAX(CASE WHEN B.col1 = 1 THEN collectDate END) AS collectDate_1
             , MAX(CASE WHEN B.col1 = 2 THEN collectDate END) AS collectDate_2
             , MAX(CASE WHEN B.col1 = 1 THEN CounterValue END) CounterValue_1
             , MAX(CASE WHEN B.col1 = 2 THEN CounterValue END) CounterValue_2
             , CONVERT(decimal(38,2), (MAX(CASE WHEN B.col1 = 1 THEN CounterValue END) - MAX(CASE WHEN B.col1 = 2 THEN CounterValue END)) 
                                    / (CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(SECOND, MAX(CASE WHEN B.col1 = 2 THEN collectDate END) , MAX(CASE WHEN B.col1 = 1 THEN collectDate END)) = 0 THEN 1
									        ELSE DATEDIFF(SECOND, MAX(CASE WHEN B.col1 = 2 THEN collectDate END) , MAX(CASE WHEN B.col1 = 1 THEN collectDate END)) END )) CounterValue
          FROM (SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY i.ServerName ORDER BY(SELECT p.CollectDate)) as col1 
                     , p.CollectDate
                     , i.ServerName
                     , p.CounterName
                     , p.CounterType
                     , p.CounterValue
                  FROM META2_M_InstanceInfo i with (nolock)
                     , dbo.TBL2_M_Perfmon p  with (nolock)
                 WHERE p.InstanceID = i.InstanceID
               ---------------------------------------------------------------
                   and p.CollectDate between $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
                   and p.CounterName = 'Databases\Transactions/sec'
               ---------------------------------------------------------------
                ) A
             , (SELECT 1 as col1 UNION ALL SELECT 2) B 
         GROUP BY ServerName, A.col1+B.col1
        ) a
 WHERE ServerName IN ($ServerName)
   AND CounterValue IS NOT NULL
 order by time

SELECT collectDate_1 time
     , ServerName
     , CounterValue as USE_PCT
  FROM (SELECT A.col1+B.col1 ROWNUM
             , ServerName
             , MAX(CASE WHEN B.col1 = 1 THEN collectDate END) AS collectDate_1
             , MAX(CASE WHEN B.col1 = 2 THEN collectDate END) AS collectDate_2
             , MAX(CASE WHEN B.col1 = 1 THEN CounterValue END) CounterValue_1
             , MAX(CASE WHEN B.col1 = 2 THEN CounterValue END) CounterValue_2
             , CONVERT(decimal(38,2), (MAX(CASE WHEN B.col1 = 1 THEN CounterValue END) - MAX(CASE WHEN B.col1 = 2 THEN CounterValue END)) 
                                    / (CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(SECOND, MAX(CASE WHEN B.col1 = 2 THEN collectDate END) , MAX(CASE WHEN B.col1 = 1 THEN collectDate END)) = 0 THEN 1
									        ELSE DATEDIFF(SECOND, MAX(CASE WHEN B.col1 = 2 THEN collectDate END) , MAX(CASE WHEN B.col1 = 1 THEN collectDate END)) END )) CounterValue
          FROM (SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY i.ServerName ORDER BY(SELECT p.CollectDate)) as col1 
                     , p.CollectDate
                     , i.ServerName
                     , p.CounterName
                     , p.CounterType
                     , p.CounterValue
                  FROM META2_M_InstanceInfo i with (nolock)
                     , dbo.TBL2_M_Perfmon p  with (nolock)
                 WHERE p.InstanceID = i.InstanceID
               ---------------------------------------------------------------
                   and p.CollectDate between $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
                   and p.CounterName = 'Databases\Transactions/sec'
               ---------------------------------------------------------------
                ) A
             , (SELECT 1 as col1 UNION ALL SELECT 2) B 
         GROUP BY ServerName, A.col1+B.col1
        ) a
 WHERE ServerName IN ($ServerName)
   AND CounterValue IS NOT NULL
 order by time

SELECT 'MD' AS PartName
UNION
SELECT '마케팅' AS PartName
UNION
SELECT '경영지원' AS PartName
UNION
SELECT '재무' AS PartName
UNION
SELECT 'POS' AS PartName
UNION
SELECT '상품권' AS PartName
UNION
SELECT '인프라' AS PartName
